summary: This project uses pnpm, not npm. Install dependencies with `pnpm install`.
Run the test suite with `pnpm test`. CI runs it on every push.
The frontend is built with React and Vite.
The backend API is FastAPI, served by uvicorn on port 8000.
Database is PostgreSQL; we use pgvector for storing embeddings.
Commit messages must follow Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, chore:).
Code style is enforced by ruff and black; run `make lint` before pushing.
The main branch is protected; open a PR and get one approval to merge.
Secrets live in a .env file which is gitignored; never commit real API keys.
We deploy to production on Fly.io using `fly deploy`. Staging is a separate app.
The vector index is rebuilt nightly by a cron job in scripts/reindex.py.
Use Python 3.11; the repo fails on 3.9 due to new type-hint syntax.
API authentication uses JWT bearer tokens with a 24 hour expiry.
The design lead is Mei; ping her before changing the component library.
We chose ChromaDB over FAISS for easier local development and metadata filters.
Frontend state is managed with Zustand, not Redux.
All timestamps are stored in UTC; convert to local time only in the UI layer.
The RAG chunking strategy is 512 tokens per chunk with 64 token overlap.
Embeddings use the multilingual MiniLM model to support Chinese and English data.
Rate limiting is 100 requests per minute per API key.
我們的文件一律用繁體中文撰寫，程式碼註解可以用英文。
部署前必須先在 staging 環境跑過 smoke test 才能上線。
資料庫 migration 一律用 alembic 管理，不要手動修改 schema。
週會固定在每週二早上十點，開會前要更新 PROGRESS.md。
Logging uses a structured JSON format; use the `log` helper instead of print.
Image uploads go to S3; maximum size is 10MB, validated on the server side.
We use feature flags via LaunchDarkly for gradual rollouts.
The mobile app is React Native and shares the API client package with the web app.
Performance budget: API p95 latency must stay under 300ms.
Onboarding docs are in docs/onboarding.md; update them when user flows change.
